---
title: "lookup_platform"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `lookup_platform()`

Lookup Platform (Company) IDs

## Usage

```r
lookup_platform(platform_name, silent = getOption("flixpatrol.silent", FALSE))
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `platform_name` | Character vector. The name(s) of platforms to lookup. |
| `silent` | Logical. If 'FALSE', prints success messages. |

## Value

A named character vector of company IDs.

## Description

Translates platform names (e.g., "Netflix", "HBO Max") into internal company IDs.

## Details

This function queries the '/companies' endpoint using exact matching and is
fully vectorized.
